name: cx-design-gate
description: Visual fidelity gate for AI-driven UI implementation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Gate AI UI work before implementation passes.
interface.longDescription: CX Design Gate provides reusable role definitions, project context packet requirements, visual fidelity contracts, hard fail rules, score caps, and handoff prompts for AI-driven UI design and implementation workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Design Gate for this screen. First obtain a Project Context Packet, then produce or review the Visual Fidelity Contract before implementation proceeds.
